rag_rules: Place component type assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use AGREE syntax for assume, guarantee, eq, and const declarations within annex agree blocks
generic_rules: Generate AGREE contracts using visible identifiers from the AADL model
Ensure type consistency between AGREE declarations and AADL feature types
Write deterministic dependency guarantees relating visible inputs to outputs
Use valid AGREE logical operators and expression patterns
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Equation declarations use `eq name : type = expression;` syntax
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
Model fusion and architecture insertion locations
